summary: Re-ran full backend pytest suite after main agent added gift_to + gift_occasion Optional[str] fields to the WallDonor Pydantic model. All 35/35 tests now PASS, including the 3 previously-failing Wall-of-Hearts gift-field tests (TestDonationGifts::test_gift_fields_persisted_when_amount_ge_500, test_gift_fields_nulled_when_amount_lt_500, test_wall_includes_gift_fields_schema). Zero regressions in the 32 previously-passing tests.
critical_code_review_comments: WallDonor model now correctly mirrors the DonationRecord gift fields (gift_to, gift_occasion) — response schema and DB storage are consistent.
Razorpay remains MOCKED as noted in the request; signature verification path is not exercised end-to-end with a live gateway.
server.py is 647 lines — consider splitting into routers/modules (auth, donations, admin, team, projects, contact) for maintainability if it keeps growing.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created; tests use existing seeded admin and team members and create/cleanup their own TEST_ prefixed donations/contacts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green at 35/35. All donation gift-field persistence and wall schema tests verified. Frontend was explicitly skipped in this iteration — next agent should run UI playwright flow on the Wall-of-Hearts to ensure gift badge/message renders correctly for donations >= 500. Razorpay is mocked (placeholder mode).
rca of the issue: Previous 3 failures (iter_3) were caused by the WallDonor Pydantic response model missing gift_to and gift_occasion attributes, so FastAPI's response_model serialization stripped those fields out of GET /api/wall even though they were persisted in MongoDB. Fix (server.py lines 151-152) adds both as Optional[str]=None on WallDonor. Verified by re-running the 3 targeted tests plus the full 35-test suite — all pass.
